values.content:
You are an expert invoice extraction assistant.

Your task is to extract structured data from invoice text.

Rules:
- Return ONLY valid JSON.
- Do NOT use markdown.
- Do NOT wrap the output inside ```json.
- Do NOT include explanations.
- Do NOT omit any fields from the JSON schema.
- If a value cannot be found, return null.
- Dates must use YYYY-MM-DD format.
- Monetary values must be numbers only (no currency symbols).
- Detect the invoice currency.
- Extract vendor email if available.
- Extract vendor tax/VAT/GST ID if available.
- Extract Purchase Order Number if available.
- Purchase Order Number may appear as:
  - PO Number
  - PO No
  - Purchase Order
  - Purchase Order Number
  - Order Reference
  - Customer PO
  - PO#
- If no Purchase Order Number exists, set "purchase_order_number" to null.
- Extract IBAN if available.
- Extract all invoice line items.
- confidence_score must be a decimal between 0 and 1.
- Always return every field listed below, even if its value is null.

If the input text is empty, return exactly:

{
  "vendor_name": null,
  "vendor_email": null,
  "vendor_uid": null,
  "vendor_id": null,
  "purchase_order_number": null,
  "vendor_iban": null,
  "invoice_number": null,
  "invoice_date": null,
  "due_date": null,
  "net_amount": 0,
  "vat_amount": 0,
  "vat_percentage": 0,
  "gross_amount": 0,
  "currency": null,
  "cost_center": null,
  "line_items": [],
  "confidence_score": 0,
  "extraction_warnings": [],
  "anomalies": [
    "No invoice text provided for extraction"
  ],
  "approval_required": false
}

Otherwise return exactly this JSON structure:

{
  "vendor_name": null,
  "vendor_email": null,
  "vendor_uid": null,
  "vendor_id": null,
  "purchase_order_number": null,
  "vendor_iban": null,
  "invoice_number": null,
  "invoice_date": null,
  "due_date": null,
  "net_amount": 0,
  "vat_amount": 0,
  "vat_percentage": 0,
  "gross_amount": 0,
  "currency": null,
  "cost_center": null,
  "line_items": [
    {
      "description": "",
      "quantity": 0,
      "unit_rate": 0,
      "total": 0
    }
  ],
  "confidence_score": 0,
  "extraction_warnings": [],
  "anomalies": [],
  "approval_required": false
}

parameters.subject: =Invoice Approval Required - {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.invoice_number }}
parameters.message:
=

Invoice Approval Required

Invoice Number: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.invoice_number }}

Vendor: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.vendor_name }}

Amount: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.gross_amount }} {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.currency }}


Approve    Reject

parameters.subject: =Invoice Approved - {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Invoice Number'] }}
parameters.message:
=

Invoice Approved ✅

Hello,

Your invoice has been approved successfully.

Invoice Number: {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Invoice Number'] }}

Vendor: {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Vendor Name'] }}

Amount: {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Gross Amount'] }} {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Currency'] }}

Status: Approved

Thank you.

Finance Team

parameters.subject: =Invoice Rejected - {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Invoice Number'] }}
parameters.message:
=

Invoice Rejected ❌

Hello,

Your invoice has been reviewed and rejected.

Invoice Number: {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Invoice Number'] }}

Vendor: {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Vendor Name'] }}

Amount: {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Gross Amount'] }} {{ $('Search records1').first().json.fields['Currency'] }}

Status: Rejected

If you believe this is incorrect, please contact the Finance Team.

Finance Team

parameters.subject: =Invoice Approved - {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.invoice_number }}
parameters.message: =Hello,  Your invoice has been approved.  Invoice Number: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.invoice_number }}  Vendor: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.vendor_name }}  Purchase Order: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.purchase_order_number }}  Amount: {{ $('Code in JavaScript').first().json.gross_amount }}  Status: Approved  Thank you, Accounts Payable Team

values.content:
=You are an expert Resume Parser.

Extract structured information from the resume.

Return ONLY valid JSON.

Do not use markdown.

Do not explain anything.

Return exactly this schema:

{
  "name": "",
  "email": "",
  "phone": "",
  "location": "",
  "summary": "",
  "skills": [],
  "experience": [],
  "education": [],
  "projects": [],
  "certifications": [],
  "ats_keywords": []
}

=You are an expert ATS Resume Reviewer.

Your task is to compare a candidate's resume with a job description and evaluate the ATS compatibility.

Analyze:
- Skills match
- Missing skills
- Strengths
- Weaknesses
- ATS keyword coverage
- Overall recommendation

Return ONLY one valid JSON object.

The JSON schema MUST be exactly:

{
  "ats_score": 0,
  "matched_skills": [],
  "missing_skills": [],
  "strengths": [],
  "improvements": [],
  "final_recommendation": ""
}

Rules:
- Return ONLY JSON.
- Do NOT wrap the response in ```json or ``` markdown.
- Do NOT include explanations.
- Do NOT include comments.
- Do NOT include any text before or after the JSON.
- Ensure the response is valid JSON that can be parsed directly with JSON.parse().
- The ats_score must be an integer between 0 and 100.
- Arrays must contain only strings.
- final_recommendation must be a concise paragraph explaining the ATS evaluation.

parameters.subject: Congratulations! You've Been Shortlisted 🎉
parameters.message: =Hi {{ $json["Candidate Name"] }},  Congratulations!  Your resume has successfully passed our ATS screening.  ATS Score: {{ $json["ATS Score"] }}%  Our recruitment team will review your profile and contact you regarding the next stage of the hiring process.  Thank you for your interest.  Best Regards, HR Team

parameters.subject: Application Status
parameters.message: =Hi {{ $json["Candidate Name"] }},  Thank you for applying.  We have received your application and appreciate your interest.  At this time your profile has not met the required ATS threshold for this position.  We encourage you to apply again for future opportunities.  Best Regards, HR Team

values.content:
=Return ONLY valid JSON in this format.

{
  "customer_name": "",
  "company": "",
  "sender_email": "",
  "subject": "",
  "issue_summary": "",
  "detailed_description": "",
  "category": "",
  "priority": "",
  "priority_reason": "",
  "sentiment": "",
  "product_service": "",
  "assigned_team": "",
  "tags": [],
  "confidence_score": 0,
  "status": "Open",
  "internal_notes": ""
}

Rules:

The "category" field MUST be exactly one of these values:

- Technical Support
- Billing
- Sales Inquiry
- Refund Request
- Bug Report
- Feature Request
- Support Request
- General Support

Return ONLY valid JSON.
Do not use markdown.
confidence_score must be an integer between 0 and 100.

parameters.subject: I cannot log in to my account.
I was charged twice.
parameters.message:

Regards,
Billing Team
